description_long: This is a small, round wooden stool with a dark, rich finish and a classic, traditional design. The seat is circular and slightly beveled at the edge, giving it a subtle, elegant contour. The apron beneath the seat features a scalloped edge, adding a decorative touch to the otherwise simple form. The stool stands on four gently curved legs that taper slightly towards the bottom, providing stability and a touch of sophistication. The wood grain is visible through the dark stain, enhancing its vintage appearance. There are no visible backrests, footrests, or additional functional components.
description: A dark, round wooden stool with a scalloped apron and four curved legs, featuring a traditional, vintage style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat, scalloped apron, and two of the four curved legs.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the side profile and the curvature of the legs.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to view 1, with the scalloped apron and leg details visible.
description_view_3: Back view, nearly identical to the front, showing the round seat and the rear pair of curved legs.
